title: Maya's 30 days
copy:
30 days ago, Maya couldn't do a single push-up.

This week, she hit 12. Clean. Unbroken.

But the part she's most proud of? She slept through the night for the first time in two years.

Strength isn't always the number on the bar. Sometimes it's the quiet stuff.

Maya - we're so proud of you.
cta: Tag someone whose transformation inspired you
